results.title: AI Answer
results.snippet: In 2025, AI saw major acquisitions, significant advancements in virtual assistants, and notable hardware innovations. Google announced Gemini updates and new AI features. The year highlighted AI's impact on digital safety and creativity.

results.title: The 10 Biggest AI News Stories Of 2025 - CRN
results.snippet: The AI industry in 2025 saw big-money acquisitions, advancements in virtual assistants and agent orchestration, and new innovations in hardware

results.title: 60 of our biggest AI announcements in 2025 - Google Blog
results.snippet: Gemini updates, AI Mode in Search and new hardware were just a few of the highlights. Look forward to more AI advancements from Google in 2026.
